item.description:
### Fixed - **Codex sessions no longer show "Idle" mid-task.** During a long Codex turn with a lot of output, the menu bar could flip to Idle while Codex was still visibly working. Perch now looks further back in the session log to find the turn's true state, so the working indicator stays accurate through even the longest tasks.
### Changed - **The first Stats scan is more than twice as fast.** The one-time read of your history when you first open Stats now finishes in less than half the time it did in 0.4.0, with the same low memory use. (Already-scanned Macs won't notice — later opens were always instant.) - **Lighter on your Mac.** The background check that keeps the session list fresh no longer launches helper processes every few seconds and reads session activity far more efficiently — less CPU and battery for the same up-to-date menu bar.
